✦ About the Pastor

A Life Surrendered to God

Rev. Dr. Gospel Isaac Ekechi is the Senior Pastor and Founder of Kings Restoration Ministries International – Sanctuary of Praise, based in Milan, Italy. Called by God from an early age, he has dedicated his life to the proclamation of the Gospel, the healing of the broken-hearted, and the restoration of lives through the power of the Holy Spirit.

With a deep passion for worship and intercession, Pastor Gospel has built a vibrant international congregation that reflects the diversity and unity of the Body of Christ. His ministry is marked by signs, wonders, and a genuine love for people — drawing believers from across Europe and beyond to encounter the living God.

A trained theologian and ordained minister, Rev. Dr. Ekechi holds deep convictions about the authority of Scripture, the power of prayer, and the necessity of the Holy Spirit in every aspect of church life. His preaching is bold, Spirit-filled, and rooted in the Word of God, consistently pointing people to Jesus Christ as the source of all restoration.

Under his leadership, Kings Restoration Ministries International has grown into a house of praise that reaches thousands through its weekly Sunday services and live broadcasts on Facebook and YouTube — bringing the Good News of Jesus Christ to the nations.

"We are not just a church — we are a place where God restores what the enemy has stolen. Every person who walks through our doors will leave with a testimony."

Ministry Highlights

Founder and senior leader of Kings Restoration Ministries International, Milan, Italy.

🌍 International Outreach

Ministry reaches across Europe and Africa through in-person services and online broadcasts.

🎙️ Gospel Music & Worship

Active on YouTube as a gospel minister, releasing anointed music that glorifies God.

🙏 Healing & Deliverance

A ministry marked by divine healing, restoration, and the miraculous power of God.
